series_metadata.series_title: Highway Technician Series Physical Ability Test Administration Databases
series_metadata.series_description: These records document the official schedules, scores, bio-data, notification dates, and position tested for in the Highway Technician series selection/hiring process re: The Physical Ability Test (PAT).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronic documents for at least six (6) years from administration date. Then destroy/delete unless litigation is pending (consult Personnel or Chief Legal)., Electronic: Delete
